message:
feat(Lib): Implement numbers, dataclasses, platform, inspect modules

Add comprehensive implementations for 4 more Python stdlib modules:
- numbers.zig: Numeric tower (Number, Complex, Real, Rational, Integral)
- dataclasses.zig: Dataclass generator with auto __repr__, __eq__, __hash__
- platform.zig: Platform identification (system, machine, python_version)
- inspect.zig: Type introspection predicates and signature analysis
